subcodes.first_line: O thou who drinkest the choice wine of My love, who standest to serve My Cause, and who uttereth My beauteous praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الشارب رحیق حبی و القائم علی خدمه امری و الناطق بثنائی الجمیل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
